user.title: Grass Growth Predictor
user.description: Connect to OpenWeatherMap and configure growth model parameters.

data_description.mowed_to_height: Height in inches the lawn was last cut to (default 3.0).
data_description.base_growth_rate: Maximum daily growth in inches under ideal conditions (default 0.15).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach OpenWeatherMap. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_api_key: The OpenWeatherMap API key was rejected. Verify the key and try again.

abort.already_configured: A Grass Growth Predictor entry already exists for this location.

mark_mowed.name: Mark Mowed
mark_mowed.description: Records a mowing event and resets the grass growth timer.

mowed_to_height.name: Mowed-To Height
mowed_to_height.description: Height the grass was cut to in inches.
